title: calcaratolobelia pringlei
intro: Calcaratolobelia pringlei is a species of flowering plant in the bellflower family, native to Hawaii. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calcaratolobelia pringlei include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Calcaratolobelia pringlei can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, for medicinal use.
